title: Lazuli Lib
description: Library to help you create visuals that make people go OHH!
body:
##  LazuliLib, visuals that makes people go OHHH!!

Introducing LazuliLib! a lightweight and flexible library designed to rendering easier and more acessible than ever!

###  ˙⋆✮ Features ✮⋆˙

-  **Easy Shader Registration**  
  Simplify the process of registering and using custom shaders!

-  **Pratical geometry building**  
  All of the vannila geometry building in a way more pratical manner!

-  **Built-in Zoom Commands**  
  Add zooming functionality to your mod with no extra dependencies or setup!

Future planned additions are a visual in-game shader editor, BlockBench models support, STL 3d file support and a custom particle system!

[link to development documentation](https://github.com/AzuraNishio/Lazuli_lib/blob/main/docs/index.md)
